name: Zucchini Spice Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare 12 muffin cups.
2. In a large bowl, mix flour, sugar, nuts, oats, baking powder, salt and spices.
3. In a separate bowl, beat eggs with a fork; stir in zucchini and oil.
4. Pour the egg mixture all at once into the flour mixture; stir just until moistened (the batter will be lumpy).
5. Bake for 20 minutes at 400°F.
6. Optional: Dip tops of warm muffins in melted butter, then in a mixture of cinnamon and sugar.
